first_steps.title: First steps
first_steps.content: Passionate about video games since childhood, I grew up on classics like Doom, UT99, and Fire Emblem across PC, N64, PSP and many more. This early fascination naturally led me to become a Game Programmer, bridging the gap between software engineering and creative design.

game_dev.title: Game Development Expertise
game_dev.content: Starting as a self-taught dev before graduating from a specialized school, I solidified my foundations in C++ and C#. In 2019, I joined HandyGames (THQ Nordic) in Germany, focusing on gameplay, UI, and engine tools. Mastering Unity and Unreal (4 & 5) alongside industry seniors, I then brought this expertise to the renowned Canadian studio Frima for three years.

web_dev.title: Web Development & Full-Stack Skills
web_dev.content: Upon returning to France, I expanded my horizons into modern web technologies. Graduating as a Web Developer in early 2026, I now build responsive applications using HTML5, CSS3/SASS, JavaScript, React and SQL/NoSQL databases.

versatility.title: Versatility & Collaboration
versatility.content: Driven by curiosity and creativity, I am a strong advocate for Scrum and iterative delivery. My versatile profile also includes:
list: Multimedia Production (Music, sound design, and video editing).
versatility.footer: I find that sharing knowledge within multidisciplinary teams is the most rewarding part of my work.
